evidence: "I love 1950's Tony Curtis movies.......This one is terrific."
"This is one of my all time favorite movies....I saw this movie when I was a kid and fell in love with it."
"Just an all out fun movie....Did I mention that I have strange taste in movies......."
"It's got Tony Curtis and Piper Laurie.....that's all I need.......but it might not be enough for everyone else."
"I remember all of them from my childhood. They're my 'feel good' movies."
"I will admit this film is a lot campier than I remembered. What I thought was a very romantic and visually beautiful movie ......is really just plain funny."
"The cast, the production, the stories and the music are the very best."
"Rita Hayworth is my all time favorite actress....she can do no wrong as far as I'm concerned.....If she's in it ....I love it !!!!!!!!"
"any movie with Romola Garai is worth seeing......fantastic actress !!!!!!!!!"
"great color, great actors and good stories."
"I have been waiting for decades for this movie to be released on any type of home video...Just an all out fun movie...."
"Can't get enough of it. Highly recommended."

summary: The user has a strong preference for classic films and comedies, particularly those featuring beloved actors from the 1950s. They appreciate high production quality and enjoy simple, fast-paced narratives that evoke strong emotional responses.
